items.title: Five and a half hours that left England's World Cup tie in chaos
items.summary: For several hours on Friday, no-one seemed to know when England's World Cup last-16 match against co-hosts Mexico would kick off. BBC Sport tells how a story of confusion and an...

items.title: 'How has Sooryavanshi not played?': Ex-England captain baffled by India's decision
items.summary: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's international debut remains elusive, sparking debate among cricket legends like Michael Vaughan and Sunil Gavaskar. Despite immense hype...

items.title: Qualifiers eye more shocks after causing Wimbledon upsets
items.summary: Qualifiers Roman Safiullin and Shintaro Mochizuki set their sights on toppling title challengers Novak Djokovic and Jannik Sinner after causing huge upsets at Wimbledon.
